sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96749" key="sthrikto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στηρ-ικτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n96749.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solid, firmly based,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hymn.Is.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">163</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n96749.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
